title: Time Machine Tangle
short_description: The time machine scrambled history! Drag events into order — oldest at the top, newest at the bottom.
description: Professor Tick's time machine hiccuped and scrambled history! Events from the past are all jumbled up. Use the up and down arrows to put them back in chronological order — oldest at the top, newest at the bottom — then hit CHECK to mend the timeline and reveal when each one really happened. Younger players sequence everyday stories (a seed becomes a tree, horses give way to aeroplanes); older players order real dated history, from the Great Pyramid and Ancient Rome to Columbus, the light bulb and the Moon landing. A free online history and chronological-thinking game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Tap the ▲ ▼ arrows to reorder events, then CHECK the timeline.
